automations.name: FlowWiki 每日数据监控
automations.description: 每天 9:00 拉取 stars/forks/traffic/issues/PRs 数据，写入 ~/.workbuddy/monitoring/flowwiki/daily-YYYY-MM-DD.md

automations.name: FlowWiki Issue/PR 巡检与回复
automations.description: 工作日 9:00 + 17:00 检测未回应项，草拟回复到 ~/.workbuddy/monitoring/flowwiki/draft-reply-<N>.md

automations.name: FlowWiki 每周增长周报
automations.description: 每周一 9:00 环比分析 stars/forks/views/clones，生成周报
